name: function 1
function 2
function 3
function 4
function 5
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT table_name
FROM information_schema.tables t
WHERE t.table_schema = '_dc54e3ae4a9024bb'
AND t.table_name LIKE 'tab%'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM information_schema.columns c
    WHERE c.table_schema = t.table_schema
    AND c.table_name = t.table_name
    AND c.column_name = 'docstatus'
)
AND (
    -- Core manufacturing only
    table_name IN (
        'tabBOM',
        'tabWork Order',
        'tabJob Card',
        'tabProduction Plan',
        'tabWorkstation',
        'tabOperation',
        'tabItem',
        'tabWarehouse',
        'tabStock Ledger Entry',
        'tabBin',
        'tabSales Order',
        'tabPurchase Order',
        'tabCompany',
        'tabUOM'
    )
    OR table_name LIKE 'tabBOM %'  -- BOM Item, BOM Operation, etc.
    OR table_name LIKE 'tabStock Entry%'
    OR table_name LIKE 'tabBatch%'
    OR table_name LIKE 'tabSerial%'
)
ORDER BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN table_name = 'tabCompany' THEN 1
        WHEN table_name = 'tabUOM' THEN 2
        WHEN table_name = 'tabItem' THEN 3
        WHEN table_name = 'tabWarehouse' THEN 4
        WHEN table_name = 'tabWorkstation' THEN 5
        WHEN table_name = 'tabOperation' THEN 6
        WHEN table_name = 'tabBOM' THEN 7
        WHEN table_name LIKE 'tabBOM %' THEN 8
        WHEN table_name = 'tabSales Order' THEN 9
        WHEN table_name = 'tabPurchase Order' THEN 10
        WHEN table_name = 'tabProduction Plan' THEN 11
        WHEN table_name = 'tabWork Order' THEN 12
        WHEN table_name = 'tabJob Card' THEN 13
        WHEN table_name = 'tabStock Ledger Entry' THEN 14
        WHEN table_name = 'tabBin' THEN 15
        ELSE 100
    END,
    table_name;
`;

msg.step = 'get'

return msg;

func:
msg.topic = `

FROM information_schema.tables t
WHERE t.table_schema = '_dc54e3ae4a9024bb'
AND t.table_name LIKE 'tab%'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM information_schema.columns c
    WHERE c.table_schema = t.table_schema
    AND c.table_name = t.table_name
    AND c.column_name = 'docstatus'
)
`;

msg.step = 'get'

return msg;
